workflow_params.description: JSON-encoded workflow input parameters, including input and output locations, forwarded to the workflow engine.

workflow_type.description: Workflow descriptor type. For Seqera Platform WES requests this is typically `NFL` for Nextflow, but clients must use a value supported by this WES deployment.

workflow_type_version.description: Workflow descriptor version supported by this WES deployment.

tags.description: Additional key-value metadata to attach to the GA4GH run request.

workflow_engine_parameters.description: Additional workflow engine parameters, such as `workspaceId` or `computeEnvId`, forwarded to the underlying launch request.

workflow_url.description: Workflow entrypoint URL or path to launch. When attachments are used, this can be a relative path to one of the attached files.
